chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.583 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 18.03.2025 Mr. Zuheb Raja Abbasi, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh SIP Saleem Akhtar of CRO Office -------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant within a period of three months. Learned additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded no objection for such proposal. In view of such position, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed, however, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of applicant expeditious, preferably within a period of 3 months, under intimation to this Court through learned MIT-II. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
